items.title: Executive brief from notes
items.scenario: Paste messy meeting bullets; ask for a one-page brief with decisions, owners, and risks.
items.explanation: Claude's language strength turns unstructured notes into readable narrative—human verifies names and dates.

items.title: Explain unfamiliar code
items.scenario: Paste a 40-line function; ask what it does and which edge cases fail.
items.explanation: Code explanation is a core developer strength—run tests to confirm, don't merge blindly.
